description: Add lightweight navigation to the blog: keyboard navigation on the blog index and the “Fresh from the build log” cards on the landing page (j/k and arrow keys), plus previous/next links at the bottom of each post page, keeping the UI calm and minimal.

userStories.title: Keyboard Navigation on Index
userStories.description: As a reader, I want to move through blog cards with the keyboard so I can scan posts quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: j or ArrowDown moves focus to the next card
k or ArrowUp moves focus to the previous card
ArrowRight moves focus to the next card; ArrowLeft to the previous
Focus wraps at the ends (last to first, first to last)
Keyboard navigation does not trigger when typing in inputs, textareas, or contenteditable elements
Clicking a card keeps the focused state in sync
A subtle visual focus state appears on the active card
Works on the blog index and the “Fresh from the build log” cards on the landing page
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill

userStories.title: Previous/Next on Post Page
userStories.description: As a reader, I want links to the previous/next post so I can continue reading in order.
acceptanceCriteria: Post pages show previous/next links near the bottom
Ordering is based on post date (newest to oldest) using posts from web/src/app/blog/posts.ts
Links include post titles and clear labels
Previous/next links do not render when there is no adjacent post
Verify in browser using agent-browser skill
